title: Golden Tree Hotel Owner, Eze Hails Oriade LCDA Chair Olojede - FinancialEDGE
description: The CEO of Golden Tree hotel at Ayinke Simpson Street, Satellite Town, Lagos, Chief Simon Eze has hailed the executive Chairman of Oriade LCDA, Hon. Rasaq Akorede Olojede for his equitable distribution of developmental projects across the wards of the council in the last three months of his administration. The hospitality merchant made the
html: The CEO of Golden Tree hotel at Ayinke Simpson Street, Satellite Town, Lagos, Chief Simon Eze has hailed the executive Chairman of Oriade LCDA, Hon. Rasaq Akorede Olojede for his equitable distribution of developmental projects across the wards of the council in the last three months of his administration.
